name: Cisco IOS XE Web UI privilege escalation (CVE-2024-20418)
description: A critical privilege escalation vulnerability in the web UI of Cisco IOS XE allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to gain root-level access. Affected versions include IOS XE 17.x prior to 17.9.4a. Cisco has released patches and recommends disabling the HTTP server feature if patching is not immediately possible. Network routers and switches running IOS XE are at risk.
